text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: dbaio
Date: Thu Sep  5 23:54:46 UTC 2019
New revision: 511275
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/511275

Log:
  dns/ldns: Fix ldns-config

  After the last update ldns-config is producing wrong information and at least
  dns/opendnssec and dns/opendnssec2 are failing to build.

  PR:		240297
  Submitted by:	Jaap Akkerhuis <jaap@NLnetLabs.nl> (maintainer)
  Reported by:	Roman Serbski <mefystofel@gmail.com>

Changes:
  head/dns/ldns/Makefile
  head/dns/ldns/files/
  head/dns/ldns/files/patch-packaging_ldns-config.in
